description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Continuous builds that triggers on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow has two jobs: build and upload. The build job uses a matrix strategy to build on multiple architectures and environments, checking out the repository, setting up QEMU integration, building in a Docker container, and archiving artifacts. The upload job depends on the build job, downloads artifacts, creates a release, and uploads artifacts to a WebDAV server.
